“祝你风光 举世无双”","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyGaKjD5vOT6fY/etQQk5yAlt/cu1otBu7dD+taMMrS3","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ae47cff8d68f4150b6843407b2bad637~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704410&x-signature=qyqHJFE8mITdg%2BiPE%2FBdRZ2jltY%3D","user_id":"2034533356284628","user_name":"流浪马戏团不流浪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2034533356284628","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594503592912931864","book_info":{"abstract":"【恶女+大小姐+万人迷+修罗场+1vn】
圣克莱尔学院，是世界顶级的贵族堡垒。这里的学生家世显赫，规则森严——直到一个叫“姜肆”的女人出现。

“姜”是大姓，辛辣、呛人、难以忽视。

“肆”是放肆，不受拘束、肆意而为。

姜肆的名字，就是她一生的行事准则——她从不问合不合理，只问高不高兴。

规则对她而言，不是约束，而是可以随时改写的条款。别人小心翼翼地在规则里游走，她站在规则之上，俯视所有人。

在圣克莱尔，她把校规当废纸，把学生会当玩具，把所有人的自尊踩在脚下，再优雅地转身离开。

有人怕她，有人恨她，也有人疯狂迷恋她，

学生会会长为她信仰崩塌，甘愿从审判者变成信徒；

老牌财团的继承人，一样边嘴硬嫌她麻烦，一边为她砸钱陪她疯；

病弱的天才艺术家，把她画进每一幅作品，视她为唯一的缪斯；

铁血的军权世子，向来冷漠避世，却为她破例出手，化肃杀为专属守护；

就连她身边沉默寡言的保镖，也愿为她染上一身血。

而她，站在所有人的头顶，看他们为她厮杀。

“想追我？可以，先把你的继承权交给我。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/dd3c33093649f90897b73023474c6d0b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"修罗场忠实爱好者","author_id":"","book_id":"7594503592912931864","book_name":"恶女永存，大小姐的驯服游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594503600949183000","read_count":"472","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"200211"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"87","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,豪门世家,校园,打脸,大小姐,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dd3c33093649f90897b73023474c6d0b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303333&x-signature=oYAtrxuSSsfoOL9Il0RTmyCrJNI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"822861662787101","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322025533D3BD9D5E2FFA0056B8A8"}"},"relate_i 对了作者大大结局会考虑一下变成1v1吗，我感觉我只喜欢沈野这个男主，其他男主对我来说无感还有点嫌弃，因为我是强烈双洁，双处，双初吻 初恋，主动肢体接触其他的我也不喜欢，因为其他男主上一世还是原著肢体接触还碰了嘴唇，就是问下作者大大最后结局考不考虑女主和沈野1v1，当然不考虑也可以的，我也会看下去的，不过我可能在看的时候会忽略掉这段啦[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771592777,"group_id":"7594503592912931864","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N42M8rTNc5dPrBAOSUguToc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d4a4481d73b04040bd9962a031191355~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710429&x-signature=zUhAcHWspIBPkBo%2FjweQWBdA58Q%3D","user_id":"288530062647417","user_name":"'无-梦^"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"288530062647417","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594503592912931864","book_info":{"abstract":"【恶女+大小姐+万人迷+修罗场+1vn】
